outcome_contract.why: The "Designed in Positano" claim is the heart of Caryina's brand. Without an About page, the claim feels thin and unsubstantiated. A short brand story reinforces trust and differentiates from generic dropshippers.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: Brand story page live at `/about` in all three locales, linked from header nav and site footer, with copy derived from the strategy dossier and placeholder image slot ready for operator-supplied photography.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Support page provides exact template: `max-w-3xl rounded-lg border p-6`; brand tokens established
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: About needs a hero element (image placeholder) not in current support pattern
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Add hero slot with PLACEHOLDER `<div>` + TODO comment

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Content pages have no loading/error states — static content resolved at SSR
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: No edge cases; if locale param is invalid, `resolveLocale` falls back to `en`

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Static content page; no user input, no auth, no PII processing
GA4 page-view tracking already active via layout; no custom events needed
`contentPacket.test.ts` pattern established; `support/page.test.tsx` is the reference; no existing sitemap test file in the Caryina app
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: New accessor test + page render test; sitemap test does not exist — out of scope unless explicitly added

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: `SiteContentPayload` interface in contentPacket.ts; `CHROME_DEFAULTS` for nav microcopy; single JSON copy at `data/shops/caryina/site-content.generated.json`
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: `CHROME_DEFAULTS` must be updated in TypeScript (not JSON) for nav labels; JSON must be updated for About page content section
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: One JSON file + one TypeScript constant block to update

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Static server component; no data fetching; Next.js caches by default
Cloudflare Pages deploy; static export; About route is purely additive — rollback is removing the directory commit
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: No risk; new route with no dependencies on existing routes

open_operator_questions: What hero image or visual element should appear on the About page?

stage_payload.scope_summary: Caryina's primary brand claim — "Designed in Positano, Italy" — appears on every page (homepage eyebrow, product cards, footer) but has no supporting page behind it. Visitors who respond to the provenance claim and want to know more hit a dead end: the company identity only surfaces in legal copy (support page). An About page would give the origin story a home, substantiate the claim, and differentiate Caryina from generic dropshippers. This requires: a new `/about` route (code), i18n content for en/de/it (business artifact), nav/footer link additions (code), and sitemap update (code).
goals: Add `/[lang]/about` route serving a short brand story page in all three locales (en/de/it)
Add About to header nav and/or site footer so the page is discoverable
Draft brand story copy from existing strategy documents; mark photographer/image decisions as PLACEHOLDER
Update sitemap.ts to include `/about` in all locales
Content should be consistent with the brand voice: conversational, confident, no hard sell, whitespace-first
non_goals: Full brand redesign or visual overhaul
Custom photography shoot (images will be PLACEHOLDER)
Deep founder biography or press-style page
Adding the About page to the checkout/cart flow chrome
constraints: All existing locales (en, de, it) should be served from day one — `generateStaticParams` emits en/de/it independently of page content so missing About translations are a content-quality gap, not a build failure; `localizedText()` falls back to English. Full de/it translations in the same build is preferred but not a hard blocker.
Content must follow the contentPacket.ts / `data/shops/caryina/site-content.generated.json` architecture — no inline string literals in page.tsx
assumptions: About page link goes in both header nav and footer (standard for small DTC brands)
Story can be drafted in full from existing strategy documents; content does NOT require operator input before build proceeds

i18n (de/it translations) can be machine-assisted from en copy in the same build cycle; `LocalizedText` accepts `de?`/`it?` as optional so missing translations degrade gracefully to English — full de/it in one build is preferred but not a hard requirement
No server-side data fetching needed beyond the existing contentPacket pattern

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: Single JSON copy confirmed; CHROME_DEFAULTS is the source for nav labels (not JSON)
Machine translation risk flagged; TODO comment for operator review
Three test surfaces identified (accessor unit, page render, sitemap)

process_topology.note: None: local code path only. This is a net-new static content page. There is no existing operator runbook, approval path, or multi-step process being altered. The change adds a new route to the site content catalogue.
